ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The user's name or handle */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the user (e.g., display name) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale of the user (e.g., en_US) */,
  "age_rank" INTEGER /* Age rank of the user based on the platform's ranking system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "dob" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the profile belongs */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography or description */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences in JSON format (e.g., notification settings) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "interests" TEXT /* User's interests in JSON format */,
  "education" TEXT /* User's educational background in JSON format */,
  "work_experience" TEXT /* User's work experience in JSON format */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's personal or professional website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, moderator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON structure defining the permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the friendship */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend added */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the friendship was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted, blocked) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the friendship status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_friends_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_friends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, post, message) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type from which the activity was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was read by the receiver */,
  "deleted_by_sender" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message was deleted by the sender */,
  "deleted_by_receiver" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message was deleted by the receiver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post has received */,
  "shared" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the post (e.g., public, friends, only me) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., message, comment, like) */,
  "source_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the notification */,
  "source_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the notification, if applicable */,
  "source_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment related to the notification, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "settings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settings entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the settings belong */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* User's privacy settings in JSON format */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* User's notification settings in JSON format */,
  "theme_settings" TEXT /* User's theme preferences in JSON format */,
  "language_settings" TEXT /* User's language preferences in JSON format */,
  "two_factor_authentication" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has two-factor authentication enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the role assignment */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
